howItWorks.intro: This time zone converter uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Conversion
rules.formula: New Time = Original + (To Zone - From Zone)
rules.explanation: Add the difference in UTC offsets.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: Coordinated Universal Time, the global time standard. EST is UTC-5, JST is UTC+9.

faq.q: Do all zones shift for daylight saving?
faq.a: No, many countries and US states do not observe daylight saving time.
